```{=html}
<div style="width:90%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.4em 1.2em;border-radius:18px;">

 <!-- equation header: A Minimum Website = Several HTML Pages + A Stylesheet -->
 <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:0.55em;flex-wrap:nowrap;">

  <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.45em;background:#FFFFFF;border:1px solid #C7C1E5;border-radius:10px;padding:0.32em 0.75em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(86,84,162,0.1);">
   <div style="width:1.5em;height:1.5em;border-radius:0.4em;background:#EEEDF8;border:1px solid #C7C1E5;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#5654A2;flex-shrink:0;"><i data-lucide="globe" style="width:0.85em;height:0.85em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;font-weight:700;color:#5654A2;line-height:1.1;white-space:nowrap;">A Minimum Website</div>
  </div>

  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;color:#9B8EA0;font-size:0.7em;font-weight:700;">=</span>

  <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.45em;background:#FFFFFF;border:1px solid #F0C5BA;border-radius:10px;padding:0.32em 0.75em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(212,95,71,0.1);">
   <div style="width:1.5em;height:1.5em;border-radius:0.4em;background:#FCEEEC;border:1px solid #F0C5BA;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#D45F47;flex-shrink:0;"><i data-lucide="file-code" style="width:0.85em;height:0.85em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;font-weight:700;color:#D45F47;line-height:1.1;white-space:nowrap;">Several HTML Pages</div>
  </div>

  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;color:#9B8EA0;font-size:0.7em;font-weight:700;">+</span>

  <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.45em;background:#FFFFFF;border:1px solid #A6C4EA;border-radius:10px;padding:0.32em 0.75em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(58,125,201,0.1);">
   <div style="width:1.5em;height:1.5em;border-radius:0.4em;background:#DCE9FA;border:1px solid #A6C4EA;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#3A7DC9;flex-shrink:0;"><i data-lucide="palette" style="width:0.85em;height:0.85em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;font-weight:700;color:#3A7DC9;line-height:1.1;white-space:nowrap;">A Stylesheet</div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <!-- divider -->
 <div style="height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#C4C3E8,transparent);margin:0.9em 0 1.1em;"></div>

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1em;align-items:stretch;">

  <div class="site-tree" style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:1.1em 1.3em;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(58,125,201,0.12);text-align:left;">

   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.5em;margin-bottom:0.85em;">
    <div style="width:1.7em;height:1.7em;border-radius:0.45em;background:#EEEDF8;border:1px solid #C7C1E5;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#5654A2;flex-shrink:0;"><i data-lucide="folder" style="width:0.9em;height:0.9em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;font-weight:700;color:#2C3E50;">my-website/</span>
   </div>

   <div class="struct-row struct-folder">
    <span class="struct-connector">├─ </span><span class="struct-label"><i data-lucide="folder" style="width:0.95em;height:0.95em;stroke-width:1.8;color:#D45F47;"></i><span class="struct-name">html/</span></span>
   </div>
   <div class="struct-row struct-file" data-file="index.html" onclick="window.openSitePage&&openSitePage(this,'s2-structure-example-1.html')">
    <span class="struct-connector">│   ├─ </span><span class="struct-label"><i data-lucide="file-code" style="width:0.95em;height:0.95em;stroke-width:1.8;color:#D45F47;"></i><span class="struct-name">index.html</span></span>
   </div>
   <div class="struct-row struct-file" data-file="about.html" onclick="window.openSitePage&&openSitePage(this,'s2-structure-example-2.html')">
    <span class="struct-connector">│   ├─ </span><span class="struct-label"><i data-lucide="file-code" style="width:0.95em;height:0.95em;stroke-width:1.8;color:#D45F47;"></i><span class="struct-name">about.html</span></span>
   </div>
   <div class="struct-row struct-file" data-file="projects.html" onclick="window.openSitePage&&openSitePage(this,'s2-structure-example-3.html')">
    <span class="struct-connector">│   ├─ </span><span class="struct-label"><i data-lucide="file-code" style="width:0.95em;height:0.95em;stroke-width:1.8;color:#D45F47;"></i><span class="struct-name">projects.html</span></span>
   </div>
   <div class="struct-row struct-file" data-file="contact.html" onclick="window.openSitePage&&openSitePage(this,'s2-structure-example-4.html')">
    <span class="struct-connector">│   └─ </span><span class="struct-label"><i data-lucide="file-code" style="width:0.95em;height:0.95em;stroke-width:1.8;color:#D45F47;"></i><span class="struct-name">contact.html</span></span>
   </div>

   <div class="struct-row struct-folder">
    <span class="struct-connector">└─ </span><span class="struct-label"><i data-lucide="folder" style="width:0.95em;height:0.95em;stroke-width:1.8;color:#3A7DC9;"></i><span class="struct-name">styles/</span></span>
   </div>
   <div class="struct-row">
    <span class="struct-connector">    └─ </span><span class="struct-label"><i data-lucide="palette" style="width:0.95em;height:0.95em;stroke-width:1.8;color:#3A7DC9;"></i><span class="struct-name" style="color:#3A7DC9;">styles.css</span></span>
   </div>

  </div>

  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(44,62,80,0.16);border:1px solid #E3DCD2;background:#FAF7F2;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.28em;padding:0.32em 0.5em;background:#F1ECE4;border-bottom:1px solid #E3DCD2;">
    <span style="width:0.38em;height:0.38em;border-radius:50%;background:#ED6A5E;display:inline-block;"></span>
    <span style="width:0.38em;height:0.38em;border-radius:50%;background:#F4BF4F;display:inline-block;"></span>
    <span style="width:0.38em;height:0.38em;border-radius:50%;background:#61C554;display:inline-block;"></span>
    <span class="site-url" style="flex:1;margin-left:0.4em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.32em;color:#9B8EA0;background:#FFFFFF;border:1px solid #E3DCD2;border-radius:999px;padding:0.2em 0.7em;">index.html</span>
   </div>
   <iframe src="resources/s2-structure-example-1.html?v=2" title="A small multi-page website" onload="window.wireSiteScroll&&wireSiteScroll(this)" style="display:block;width:100%;max-width:100%;height:330px;border:0;margin:0;background:#FAF7F2;"></iframe>
  </div>

 </div>

</div>
```
